'''Solm''' was a [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin]] member of the [[Antarian Rangers/Legends|Antarian Rangers]]. He led a group of Rangers against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the period prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], one of the few branches of that organization to act openly.

{{Char-stub}}
